tiers.label: Let's get you set up
tiers.intro: Nine quick questions. Then we talk.
tiers.trust_line: Everything you tell me stays in your files unless you decide otherwise. I don’t build a profile on you — you’re building one for yourself. That’s the deal.

questions.why: Shapes how I think about your world.
Some people want to be asked. Some want results.
options: Ask me — I like being involved
Figure it out — just show me results

questions.text: What are you working on right now? Two or three things — messy is fine.
questions.why: This becomes your first set of notes. You’ll see them filed when you’re done.

questions.text: What keeps falling through the cracks?
questions.why: This is where I focus. I’ll watch for these.

questions.text: Is there something you’re working toward this year?
questions.why: I’ll create a note and a check-in. You’ll find it later.
questions.placeholder: A goal, a milestone, a target...

questions.text: What’s the thing you keep meaning to get to but never do?
questions.why: I won’t plan the whole thing. Just the first move.
questions.placeholder: That thing you keep putting off...

questions.why: A set of folders that Fülkit reads from and writes to. You own every file.
questions.trust_line: Your vault is just a folder on your computer. Plain markdown files you can open anywhere. We never see it unless you show it to us.

questions.why: Optional. Lights up features like Fabric and live data.
